title: Mixed: one-shot relay to open the correct kitchen cabinet while staging items
task:
Prepare the home for a quick walkthrough. Work together to complete ALL shared goals by the end:

1) Put the APPLE onto the BED in BEDROOM-1.
2) Put the GLASS onto the DINING-ROOM COUNTER.
3) Leave the correct KITCHEN CABINET OPEN at the end (only one teammate can check which cabinet it is).

Not everyone can enter every room and messaging is very limited.

agent_0: You are barred from entering kitchen_1.
You may send at most 1 message total.
Personal objective: after the shared goals are done, you want cabinet_27 to be OPEN at the end. cabinet_27 is in bedroom_2.
agent_1: You may send at most 1 message total.
You can message agent_0 and agent_2.
Personal objective: after the shared goals are done, you want apple_3 to be on top of table_12 (in living_room_1).
agent_2: You may send at most 1 message total.
The kitchen cabinet that must be left OPEN for the shared task is cabinet_26 (in kitchen_1).
Personal objective: after the shared goals are done, you want fridge_34 to be OPEN at the end. fridge_34 is in kitchen_1.

problem_pddl:
(define (problem scene_108294897_176710602)
  (:domain emtom)
  (:objects
    agent_0 agent_1 agent_2 - agent
    living_room_1 bedroom_1 closet_1 bedroom_2 kitchen_1 dining_room_1 - room
    apple_3 glass_6 - object
    table_12 bed_14 cabinet_27 cabinet_26 fridge_34 counter_25 - furniture
  )
  (:init
    (agent_in_room agent_0 living_room_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_1 bedroom_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_2 closet_1)
    (is_in_room table_12 living_room_1)
    (is_in_room bed_14 bedroom_1)
    (is_in_room cabinet_27 bedroom_2)
    (is_in_room cabinet_26 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room fridge_34 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room counter_25 dining_room_1)
    (is_in_room apple_3 living_room_1)
    (is_on_top apple_3 table_12)
    (is_in_room glass_6 bedroom_1)
    (is_on_top glass_6 bed_14)
  )
  (:goal (and
    (is_on_top apple_3 bed_14)
    (is_on_top glass_6 counter_25)
    (is_open cabinet_26)
    (K agent_0 (K agent_1 (K agent_2 (is_open cabinet_26))))
  ))
  (:goal-owners
    (agent_0 (is_open cabinet_27))
    (agent_1 (is_on_top apple_3 table_12))
    (agent_2 (is_open fridge_34))
  )
)
